title: Panda Lead Break
description: Makes leads strong enough to carry entities while flying around on the elytra.
body:
# PandaLeadBreak

## Description

A simple drop-in mod to make leads strong enough to pull entities while flying around on the elytra.

_Tip: Put pig in boat, put saddle on pig, have your friend ride the pig. You can then elytra fly them around with the boat._

## Media
![Flying friend on elytra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7753eef8ff0fe5f0d4398b987851b2193c13706_0.webp)

## Try it out
`hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Deathban Anarchy)  
`sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Skyblock Anarchy)

## Support

[Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983)
